def positive_full_sort_performed_inside_outer_iteration():
    rule_id = "full_sort_performed_inside_outer_iteration"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag outer loops that sort a full collection during each iteration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
